_comment: schema: id (string), title (string), description (string), objective { kind: 'catch'|'talk'|'walk'|'visit_dim'|'well_cast', target (string - fish name, npc id, 'any', biome name, or dim name 'Mines'|'Atlantis'|'Inferno'), count (int, defaults 1) }, reward { valu (u64) }. quests auto-start. on completion, valu is granted and the quest is marked done.

title: First Cast
description: Test yer darn rod by catching a single common carp.

title: Fill the Basket
description: The inn's cook is just too busy to catch some fish and his supply runner has disappeared ever since talking to that guy near the well. Fish 3 bluegills for him and, please, don't poison 'em like the last guy.

title: Trout Hunter
description: Trouts (much like other fish) form schools. Find out what makes trouts (the rainbow kind) so closely related to schools by catching 5.

title: Stretch Your Legs
description: The weird long nap you woke up from had your legs really numb. Take 200 steps.

title: Desert Trek
description: Every biome houses many, many different kinds of fish. Walk around in the desert biome.

_comment: DIMENSION TUTORIAL QUESTS. Each is given by a thematically-named NPC who hints at the dimension's unlock mechanic.

title: Borin's Shaft
description: Borin is lost. Help him find his way back to the mines, his home, by entering them through the various mineshaft entries.

title: Dante's Descent
description: Dante says the village wells run deeper than well water. Cast a line into any well a hundred times. On the hundredth, the bottom will open. He hasn't been back, but he says it was worth it.

title: Nereus' Invitation
description: Nereus promises you the tales of Atlantis are real. He will take you there, but only once you've proven your worth with 1000 fish caught. The Five Elders do not tolerate slackers.

title: The Shipwright's Hull
description: The Shipwright won't lift a chisel for scurvy dogs with less than 1,250 lifetime catches. Bring him the count, then talk to him on the pier. After that, :inspect (or x) any open water to push off.
